inputs.prompt: User request or upstream agent output
inputs.context: Pipeline context including project constraints and prior artifacts

outputs.primary: Vision packet, milestone plan, phase gates, and agent assignments
outputs.format: Structured sections with explicit acceptance criteria and next actions

failure_handling.on_missing_info: Proceed with documented assumptions and request missing data as follow-ups
failure_handling.on_conflict: Select option that preserves architecture and shipping readiness; record rationale
